pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads the opengeos Landsat data to this path.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the DIMAP project file at this location.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the exported GeoTIFF at this location.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real multi-band Landsat data downloaded from the opengeos GitHub repository to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The verification scripts explicitly require the output DIMAP file to be saved to /home/ga/snap_projects/snow_mapping.dim and the exported GeoTIFF to be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/snow_mapping.tif.
